emails.subject: FW: Duke Meeting - Pluto Line
emails.body: FW: Duke Meeting Pluto Line Our efforts to sell Pluto/MEGS to Duke To: Mrha, Jean; Melendrez, Jesus; Druzbik, Lisa; House, John

emails.subject: RE: Duke Meeting - Pluto Line
emails.body: RE: Duke Meeting Pluto Line Is that what ECR want to do with it? To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: Duke Meeting - Pluto Line
emails.body: We are working with Jesus Melendrez,V.P., and John House of ECR. However, Kevin Miller has the relationship with Duke and was initially contacted by them. In addition, Lisa Druzbik has done the most analysis ripping apart the accounting and cash flows associated with the flowline. To: Mrha, Jean
